title: iris rubromarginata var. mellita
intro: Iris rubromarginata var. mellita, also known as the 'Mellita Fritted Iris', is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the iris family and is native to the western United States and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of Iris rubromarginata var. mellita include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of Iris rubromarginata var. mellita include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to treat various skin conditions, such as eczema, acne, and minor cuts and scrapes.
